title: Level 856
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:'''Level 856: "Endless Theater"'''}} {{Background|file=Ohyesh.jpg}}{{Kauer Theme}} {{Headerbox|file=Ohyesh.jpg|header='''M.E.G. COGNITIVE HAZARD WARNING: MONITOR NOSTALGIA LEVELS IMMEDIATELY'''|speed=18s}} {{Class 4|security=Unstable Structural Grid|entity=High Entity Count / Active Stalker|color-h=300|color-s=40%|color-l=35%}} '''Level 856''', mostly known as the Endless Theater, is a highly unstable and psychologically dangerous main level within the Backrooms.
[[File:theatercool.jpg|thumb|center|300px|A photograph of the endless theater corridors, captured by an anonymous exploration scout.]]
[[File:Capturenesty.png|center|thumb|264x264px|A localized manifestation of a corrupted cartoon movie poster found along the carpeted walls.]]
== Description == '''Level 856''' is a level that takes place in old school theater halls, branching endlessly in every direction. The place is specifically vintage looking with a thick carpet and a weirdly geometrical pattern, that completely absorb the sound of walking. The lights in this place are very dim. And the walls are covered in bright yellow velvet wallpaper. The air feels weirdly heavy and smell like stale popcorn. This place gives an extreme artificial feeling of nostalgia. And when wanderers spend their time in there for too long, they will get nauseous and lose their consciousness very slowly. But sometimes, popcorns can spawn sitting on the seats near the theater rooms. However, this is very rare and almond water is the most common drink to appear standing on the thick carpets. The movie posters on the walls seems to show cartoons and shows that wanderers used to watch in their childhood. But despite the area looking safe and seems to have low environmental danger, this level is highly unstable. Because, this level is capable of changing itself physically and also change its atmosphere completely. For an example, If a wanderer walks far enough, the level can change itself by turning the thick carpets to white soft carpets, and the walls shifts its color to purple velvet wallpaper walls. The atmosphere can turn very eerie or joyful. The unpredictable shift of the hallway’s look and atmosphere depends on what the wanderer is feeling or what is the specific personality of that wanderer. == Entities == While the environment appears abandoned, Level 856 is actively stalked by a singular, predatory entity that dominates the entire theater infrastructure. === Entity 856-A: "Static" === '''Static''' is a highly hostile, sentient entity possessing advanced shapeshifting and psychological manipulation. It highly uses the level’s nostalgic atmosphere to lure unaware wanderers into it’s traps ==== Behavioral Protocol & Environmental Signs ==== Wanderers must remain aware and careful on watching their surroundings. If a theater double-door opens by itself and a childhood cartoon begins projecting onto the screen inside, wanderers must avoid that spot immediately . This indicates that Static has entered an active hunting phase and is currently transforming into a distorted artificial copy of a cartoon character from the victim's memory. ==== True Morphology ==== When forced out of its morphic state or observed between transformations, Static manifests a towering form of a tall humanoid between 2 - 2.5 meters in height. The entity’s head possesses a shape of a tv with a static screen and a distorted cross logo in the middle of the screen. This entity is shown capable of teleporting through devices and ruining their internal connections turning their screens static as a warning that the entity is manifesting that location This entity’s presence is highly anomalous and extremely unstable. Wanderers that encountered Static’s true morphology will experience unstable emotional state, short-term memory and gives them a vertigo. Usually, wanderers wouldn’t last long and will lose their sanity shortly after because of extreme pressure from the inside of them. There is a 43% chance of a wanderer going crazy due to extreme sanity loss, and somehow getting roth syndrome and slowly transforming to [[Phenomenon 35|Entity 15]](Wretches) == Entrances and Exits == === Entrances === * Noclipping into a visibly glitching wall located within [[Level 4]] will guaranteed to transport a wanderer directly to this level. * Discovering a rare, dislocated swimming pool within [[Level 37.5]] that stretches downwards to a dark abyss allows for entry. If a wanderer swims to the absolute bottom of this abyss, they will locate an industrial vent; opening this vent grants direct physical access to Level 856. === Exits === Escaping this level is a very rare occurrence. However, a few methods of escaping this level exists: * Sometimes, popcorns can spawn directly sitting on the seats near the theater room, as already mentioned earlier. However, there exists a variant of this popcorn that are highly poisonous, and chances of encountering this specific popcorn variant is a rare chance of 2%. The only difference of this popcorn and other different popcorns are these popcorns are green. If a wanderer finds it and eats it, the effects of the poison will slowly take away the wanderer’s consciousness and they will immediately wake up at [[Level !]]. * If a wanderer is mentally strong to walk far enough (between 3 to 5.2 miles), there’s a chance where they will arrive at the theater lobby. With ceramic tiled floor, an abandoned reception center, also an empty popcorn stand, and windows that show one of the areas in [[Level 0]]. In that lobby room, is a door. That door will lead wanderers to an empty room with a single red plastic slide. If wanderers go through that slide, they will end up in[[Level Fun]] or [[Level 37.2]]. == Addendum ==
[RECOVERED AUDIO LOG - M.E.G. COGNITIVE RESEARCH TEAM]
"We managed to crawl through the pool vent from 37.5... but the air in here feels heavy with old popcorn and static electricity. The hallways are infinite. I just passed the lobby area with the empty snack counters. There's a room with a slide up ahead, but the theater doors next to it are rattling. Something tall with a 1990s TV head is standing by the projector beam. The vertigo is hitting me hard just looking at that glitching screen... if I don't make it to the slide, tell the team not to eat the popcorn... it's not a normal exit..."
[LOG TERMINATED - SIGNAL LOST]
Shoutout for @redAnimates on YouTube for levels [[Category:Levels]] [[Category:Dreamcore]] [[Category:Liminality]]
